race.comment: Tricky with a few leading chances through the same race. Just leaning to CAVALRY GIRL (3) from that contest over this route. She was first up and got back in a small field, running on strongly to grab second. Drops 2kg off that and expect more positive tactics early this time. SALUTED (4) won that race first up, leading at an even clip but winning well enough. She's drawn outside CAVALRY GIRL so the first 200m will be key. RICH DOTTIE (2) was sent out favourite in the same race but was only fair in third. She's better than that but needs to show it now.  ACTUALITY (7) continues to race well and should be right there again from a soft draw, albeit she probably wants the track to dry out a touch more.
